gtfs.reason: Official CUMTA feed was not retrievable during this import.

warnings: Operational station coordinates and railway alignment geometry are derived from OpenStreetMap route relations and attributed under ODbL.
CMRL uses separate URLs for Central and Alandur on each line; these are intentionally merged into stable interchange identities.

Purple Line: OSM supplies the approximate under-construction alignment and 2 mapped stations; 48 contributed station records are listed without their Google-derived coordinates and remain pending official reconciliation against CMRL's current total of 50 stations.
